task_completion.description: Access the patient record for Lucas Tremblay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR interface shows the patient record or eChart for 'Lucas Tremblay'.

task_completion.description: Enter the MMR vaccine and its lot number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the immunizations form, 'MMR' (or similar) is selected as the vaccine, and 'MMR4829B' is entered in the lot number field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct route and site for the MMR vaccine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: For the MMR vaccine, the route is set to 'SC' (or Subcutaneous) and the site is set to 'Left Arm', 'LA', or 'Deltoid'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Meningococcal C vaccine and its lot number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the immunizations form, 'Meningococcal', 'Men-C', or similar is selected as the vaccine, and 'MEN8821X' is entered in the lot number field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct route and site for the Meningococcal C vaccine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: For the Meningococcal vaccine, the route is set to 'IM' (or Intramuscular) and the site is set to 'Right Leg', 'RL', 'Thigh', or 'Vastus'.

task_completion.description: Save the immunization records with today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The immunization records are saved and visible in the patient's history, showing both vaccines administered on today's date.

integrity.description: The agent used the OSCAR EMR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and OSCAR EMR interface, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or database commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands or scripts being executed to insert the data.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the data being typed or selected in the appropriate dropdowns and text fields within the Immunizations module.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Lucas Tremblay (DOB: 2024-03-15). Vaccine 1: MMR, Lot: MMR4829B, Route: SC (Subcutaneous), Site: Left Arm / LA / Deltoid. Vaccine 2: Meningococcal C (Men-C), Lot: MEN8821X, Route: IM (Intramuscular), Site: Right Leg / RL / Thigh / Vastus Lateralis. Both must be recorded with today's date in the OSCAR EMR system.
